confidence.explanation: All 9 primary ACs pass. UV suite partially covered: UV-3 asset scan not explicitly run, UV-5 accessibility (axe-core) not available via Playwright MCP, UV-6 no baseline exists. MRDT rate shows 2% in API/UI vs 3% documented in product spec — may be property-configured, flagged for investigation. Invoice currency field returns empty string instead of 'CAD'.

test_cases.title: Folio renders via Reservation Detail → Print Folio
test_cases.note: Print Folio button on /reservation/BK_J755DICT opens Folio Preview dialog. Full content rendered: hotel header, guest details, check-in/out dates, line items, totals, T&Cs, signature area.

test_cases.title: Folio line item rows are populated (not empty)
test_cases.note: Known defect (folio rows empty) is FIXED. Row '326 Room | 07/15/2026 | 07/17/2026 | 1 | $119.00 | $119.00' visible in folio dialog.

test_cases.title: Invoice renders via Reservation Detail → Print Invoice
test_cases.note: Print Invoice button opens Invoice Preview dialog. Invoice Number: TOTEWCLQEH. All sections rendered: header, line items with running balance, totals table, T&Cs, signature.

test_cases.title: Invoice Hotel Room charge is a dollar amount, not a ticket ID
test_cases.note: Known defect (charge shows INV-506.00) is FIXED. Hotel Room charge shows '$119.00'. API desc field = 'Hotel Room'. UI shows '326 Room'.

test_cases.title: Print Folio button invokes window.print()
test_cases.note: window.__printCalled confirmed true after clicking Print in folio dialog. No custom dialog shown.

test_cases.title: Print Invoice button invokes window.print()
test_cases.note: window.__printCalled confirmed true after clicking Print in invoice dialog. No custom dialog shown.

test_cases.title: API: GET /so/folio returns valid payload with line items
test_cases.note: HTTP 200. Keys: [invoice, terms, customer, location, booking]. 3 line items (1 room charge + 2 deposits). All required fields present. MRDT 2% (vs spec 3%) — flagged. currency field is empty string (minor).

test_cases.title: API: GET /so/invoice returns valid payload with reconciling totals
Console error scan
test_cases.note: Zero first-party console errors. One allowlisted 3rd-party 404 (Cognito favicon).

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 9 XHR API calls returned 200. Zero 4xx or 5xx responses.

test_cases.title: Broken image/asset scan
test_cases.note: Asset scan not explicitly run (axe/HEAD-fetch sweep not available in Playwright MCP). No broken images observed during session. Downgraded to needs-review.

test_cases.title: Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: Exempt: folio/invoice are read-only display documents with no save/publish flow. See exemption.md.

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: axe-core not available via Playwright MCP in this environment. No accessibility scan run. Downgraded to needs-review.

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check
test_cases.note: No baseline-stable run exists for INV-506. Cannot diff. Downgraded to needs-review (expected for first run).

issues_flagged.description: MRDT rate displayed as 2% in UI and API, but product spec documents MRDT as 3%. May be property-configured for Totem Lodge. Needs clarification.
API invoice.currency field returns empty string '' instead of 'CAD'. Spec implies CAD.
Direct URL navigation to /reservation/BK_J755DICT/folio redirects to /dashboard. Folio/Invoice only accessible via modal dialog from reservation detail page.
